name: okta_admin_role_assigned
description: An Okta administrator role was granted to a user (user.account.privilege.grant, SUCCESS) where the granted privilege name matches the regex '[aA]dministrator'.

validation.notes: The Panther rule keys on debugContext.debugData.privilegeGranted, which is NOT ingested in Honeycomb. Reconstructed by regex-matching the granted role name in the positionally-flattened target array (okta.target.N.displayName). okta.legacy_event_type = core.user.admin_privilege.granted confirms these are admin-privilege grants. Validated 16/18 privilege.grant events match (the 2 misses are 'RevOps App Admin' / custom role bindings that the Panther '[aA]dministrator' regex would also exclude). Severity escalation in the Panther rule ('Super administrator' -> HIGH) is reconstructable the same way against the target display-name columns. Dedup in Panther uses debugContext.debugData.requestId (not ingested); okta.request.id or okta.transaction.id are the closest available.
